profileDialog.title: My profile
profileDialog.educationPh: e.g. High school, Diploma, BSc, MSc
profileDialog.newPasswordHint: Leave blank to keep the current one. Minimum 6 characters.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Headline numbers show active students and teachers only.

kelas.title: Classes
kelas.subtitle: Manage classes, the session calendar, and monthly teaching plans.

reschedule.title: Reschedule session
reschedule.materiLabel: Substitute material (optional, can be more than one)
reschedule.materiHint: Materials will be added to the {{ym}} teaching plan automatically.

list.emptyHintAdmin: Click "Add class" to create the first one.
list.emptyHintUser: Contact an admin to be added to a class.
list.confirmDelete: Delete class "{{nama}}"? Existing sessions will not be deleted.
list.noSesi: No sessions for this class yet.
list.reviewSummary: View summary of materials already taught

form.guruHint: Can pick more than one — the first teacher becomes the homeroom.
form.guruEmpty: No users with the teacher role yet.
form.muridHint: Pick active students. Level will match the first student if blank.
form.addMuridPartialFail: Class created, but failed to add students: {{message}}
form.addMuridFailed: Class created, but failed to add some students.

calendar.navHelp: ←/→ shift day · ↑/↓ shift week · Esc close
calendar.confirmDelete: Delete session "{{topik}}"? This action cannot be undone.
calendar.reviewSummary: View summary of materials already taught

rencana.semesterProgress: Semester progress · click a month to jump · Sem 1 starts {{sem1}}, Sem 2 starts {{sem2}}
rencana.pickKelasFirst: Pick a class first to see the plan.
rencana.emptyTitle: No plan for this month yet.
rencana.emptyHintAdmin: Click "From curriculum" to start picking materials.
rencana.emptyHintUser: Contact your teacher/admin to draft the plan.
rencana.rencanaEmptyItems: Plan exists but has no materials yet.
rencana.noMatchSemester: No materials match this level and semester.

kehadiran.title: Attendance
kehadiran.subtitle: Summary and analytics across all session data.
kehadiran.searchPh: Type a student, teacher, or material name…
kehadiran.noDataRange: No data in this range yet.

kelasAnggota.title: Class members — {{name}}
kelasAnggota.muridEmpty: No students in this class yet.
kelasAnggota.muridAllJoined: All active students are already members.
kelasAnggota.guruEmpty: No teachers in this class yet.
kelasAnggota.guruAllJoined: All active teachers are already assigned.
kelasAnggota.guruConfirmRemovePrimary: Remove homeroom teacher {{name}}? Another teacher will become homeroom automatically.

form.kelasHintPrompt: Pick a class to save the session.

end.title: End session
end.intro: Confirm the actual times then pick the materials covered.
end.materiHint: Tick materials from this month's plan. Click "+ Library" to add off-plan materials (auto-added to the plan as completed).

summary.title: End-of-session summary
summary.subtitle: {{topik}} · {{date}} · Duration {{durasi}}
summary.materiEmpty: No materials recorded during this session.
summary.notePh: Note for the parents (optional, only parents & teachers see it)…

form.temaHint: Type to add a new theme, or pick from suggestions.
form.subTemaHint: Type to add a new sub-theme, or pick from suggestions.
form.saveRelationsHint: Save the material first to add library / curriculum relations.

picker.title: Pick material to display
picker.sesiEmpty: This session has no planned material yet.
picker.lainnyaHint: Mark a non-specific material. The session still counts as attended.
picker.lainnyaConversationHint: Class was conversation, advice, or discussion without a specific material.
picker.lainnyaPembukaanHint: Opening session — prayer, greeting, ice-breaker, or introduction.
picker.lainnyaReviewHint: Reviewing previous material without anything new.

relations.libraryDesc: Library materials related to this curriculum — when that library item is completed, the achievement auto-completes too.
relations.kurikulumDesc: Curriculum materials with the same content at a different level / age.

source.label: Material source
source.addToListHint: Set your selection above then click the button to add it to the session's material list.
source.multiHint: Tick materials to add to the session's material list. You can pick more than one across themes.
source.multiAllInList: All materials at this level are already in the list.

hub.title: Reading Sources
hub.subtitle: Al-Qur'an, prayers, Asmaul Husna, Hadits — all in one place.
hub.haditsSub: List of PPG hadith collection titles

asmaul.title: Asmaul Husna
asmaul.subtitle: The 99 beautiful names of Allah.
asmaul.searchPh: Search a name (latin / meaning / Arabic / number)…

doa.title: Prayers
doa.subtitle: Daily prayers, dzikir, and memorization from the PPG curriculum. Click a title to expand.
doa.subtitleEdit: Daily prayers, dzikir, and memorization from the PPG curriculum. Click a title to expand. Edit mode active.

hadits.title: Hadits Himpunan
hadits.subtitle: List of PPG hadith collection book titles. Hadith content is hidden; only metadata is shown.
hadits.loadFailed: Failed to load the book list.
hadits.confirmDelete: Delete book "{{name}}"? All chapters and hadiths inside will also be deleted.
hadits.fldSlugHint: leave blank to auto-derive from name

kitab.settingDesc: Target page count of this hadith collection that must be completed. Used by report card / achievement tracking.
kitab.hiddenNote: Hadith content (Arabic text + translation) is temporarily hidden. Only book metadata and the target-pages setting are shown.

karakter.title: 29 Karakter Luhur
karakter.subtitle: LDII noble traits per PPG curriculum. Admins can add / edit / delete.
karakter.confirmDeleteGroup: Delete entire group "{{name}}" and {{count}} items inside?
karakter.groupRenameNote: The change is applied to every item in group "{{name}}".

quran.ayahTitle: Click to see translation of verse {{key}}
quran.wordsUnavailable: Word-by-word is not available for this verse yet.
quran.manqulInputPh: Write a manqul note for this verse…
quran.manqulNoNote: No note for this verse yet.

achievement.title: Student achievement tracker
achievement.subtitle: Pick a tab to see the curriculum or library tracker.
achievement.pickMuridFirst: Pick a student to see their achievements.
achievement.libPickMurid: Pick a student to see the library tracker.
achievement.libEmpty: No library achievements for this student yet. Every ended session automatically adds progress here.
achievement.libHint: Click any pie to see per-item details + session history.
achievement.libRiwayatEmpty: No history for this aspect yet.

live.noMateriYet: No material is currently shown for the class.
live.replaceHint: Mark it as done before moving on, or just replace without marking it done.

photoUploader.maxSize: Photos must be 5 MB or smaller

studentMap.hint: Click a circle to open the student list for that group.

bacaan.title: Qur'an reading tracker
bacaan.subtitle: Progress is calculated from the total {{countFmt}} verses across the Qur'an.
bacaan.noSurahStarted: No surah started yet. Log a reading to start seeing progress per surah.
bacaan.errAyatFromInvalid: Fill in verse (from) with a number

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage login accounts and roles for all system users.
users.deleteConfirm: Delete user {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
users.selfDeleteBlock: You cannot delete your own account

userDetail.selfAdminWarn: ⚠ You are editing your own account. The backend will reject demote/deactivate if this is the last admin.

password.intro: Set a new password for {{name}}. Effective immediately — no old password required.

pengaturan.title: GNRS US configuration
pengaturan.subtitle: Manage accounts, roles, and curriculum in one place.

instansi.title: Organization
instansi.subtitle: The logo appears to the left of "GNRS" in the header, followed by the organization name.
instansi.logoMaxToast: Logo must be at most 1 MB
instansi.namaHint: Appears after the word GNRS — e.g. US, PPG Surabaya, etc.

kurikulum.title: Curriculum
kurikulum.subtitle: List of curriculum materials by level, theme, sub-theme, and semester.
kurikulum.editModeSuffix: Edit mode active — add / edit / delete buttons appear.
kurikulum.addSubTemaTitle: Add sub-theme (opens a new material form under this theme)
kurikulum.addGrupMateriTitle: Add material group (opens a new material form under this sub-theme)
kurikulum.deleteTemaTitle: Delete theme and all its materials
kurikulum.deleteTemaConfirm: Delete the entire theme "{{tema}}" along with {{count}} materials inside?
kurikulum.deleteSubTemaConfirm: Delete sub-theme "{{subTema}}" under "{{tema}}" along with {{count}} materials?

tahunAjaran.title: Academic year
tahunAjaran.subtitle: List of academic years. Activate one year for classes, plans, and sessions to use. Pick the start month for semesters 1 and 2 per academic year.
tahunAjaran.empty: No academic years yet. Click "Add" to create one.

tingkat.title: Levels
tingkat.subtitle: Manage age-based teaching levels. Blank age = not tied to a specific age.
tingkat.deleteConfirm: Delete level "{{nama}}"? This action cannot be undone.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp summary template
whatsapp.subtitle: Message sent to parents at the end of a session. Leave blank to revert to the default template.

ph.salutation: Parent salutation (Mr./Mrs.) from the student profile
